arts.ttl: Bellingham opens up on Liverpool transfer talks before Madrid move
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham has said a transfer to Liverpool ‘wasn’t as close as a lot of the media made out’ before his move to Real Madrid in 2023. arts.ttl: Real Madrid XI vs Liverpool – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid travel to Liverpool this evening aiming to get their Champions League defence back on track. It’s been an unconvincing start to the season for the European champions, who have taken just six points from their opening four games.
